changelog:
👋 Hey there — I'm InputBlocker, and I've been busy.

v0.2.0 is all about making ghost-tap filtering easier to *live with* day-to-day. No more diving into the app every time you need to switch things up.

**What's new:**

**🎮 Shake-to-Toggle**
Give your phone a shake — blocking toggles on and off. Three sensitivity presets so you don't trigger it by accident. Works through the overlay service, no app launch needed.

**🔔 Rich Notification**
The persistent notification isn't just a status icon anymore. Now it shows your active profile and gives you three buttons right in the shade:
- **Pause / Resume** — quick toggle
- **Cycle Profile** — flip through your configurations on the fly
- **Safe Mode** — emergency disable without hunting for the app

**🔄 Profile Cycling in QS Tile**
Your current profile name shows up in the Quick Settings tile subtitle (Android 10+). Tap to toggle blocking, and the profile name updates automatically.

**🛡️ Behind the scenes**
- Crash-path hardening — InputBlocker now recovers more gracefully from Xposed hook failures and won't leave you stuck in a boot loop
- Proper root/LSPosed detection at startup with smarter auto-restart behavior
- Cleaned up test dependencies and CI pipeline — everything builds cleaner and faster

**Why v0.2 exists:**
v0.1.0 proved the core engine works — surgical ghost filtering at the input dispatcher level. But if you had to open the app every time you wanted to pause or switch configs, you weren't really using it as a *system* tool. v0.2 closes that gap. InputBlocker now lives in your notification shade, in your Quick Settings, and in a shake of your wrist.

**What's next?**
Better auto-detection, community preset sharing, and smarter profile rules. The ghost-tap war continues.

As always — flash the module, enable in LSPosed, and your screen stays usable. Ghosts get blocked.

— InputBlocker

___
### 📥 Requirements
| | |
|---|---|
| **Root** | Magisk / KernelSU / APatch / SuperSU |
| **Framework** | LSPosed (recommended) – or Overlay Mode (no framework) |
| **Android** | 6.0+ (API 23) |
| **Version Code** | 200 |

### 🆘 Support
- **Issues**: https://github.com/Laviesss/InputBlocker/issues
- **Security**: https://github.com/Laviesss/InputBlocker/security/advisories
- **Documentation**: https://github.com/Laviesss/InputBlocker#readme
